meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to build professional user onboarding flows and overcome the 'no design skills' barrier using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert case study.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting with CSS and complex UI layouts. By leveraging Antigravity to generate clean, accessible component structures and utilizing Claude Code to automate the implementation of logical onboarding flows, you can ship enterprise-grade user experiences instantly. This workflow bypasses manual design hurdles, letting you focus on high-impact product logic.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the client's deadline is breathing down your neck, and the feature request is simple: 'Make the onboarding flow look professional.' The problem isn't the logic—it's the design. You lack the eye for spacing, typography, and visual hierarchy, and your current UI looks like a relic from the early 2000s.

But here is the secret: design is a system, not a talent. By integrating Antigravity for structural precision and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you can systematically remove the 'no design' bottleneck. We aren't just building a tutorial; we are building a repeatable architecture that turns your functional code into a polished, high-converting product experience.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the 3-5 critical steps users need to reach their 'Aha!' moment. This prevents feature creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a 4-step user onboarding JSON schema that includes 'Welcome', 'Data Import', 'Integration Setup', and 'Dashboard Launch'. Use semantic naming conventions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a state machine for a 4-step onboarding flow based on the schema provided'.

steps.title: Generate Component Structures
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, responsive container components that enforce consistent padding and margins without manual tweaking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive OnboardingStep component wrapper using Tailwind CSS classes. Include props for header, body, and action button alignment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create the OnboardingStep component using the Antigravity output'.

steps.title: Inject Interactive Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wire up state management so the onboarding flow progresses smoothly without page reloads.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook useOnboarding that manages current step state, next/back navigation, and completion tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement the useOnboarding hook and integrate it into the main App component'.

steps.title: Automate UI Consistency
steps.description: Apply a global style configuration to ensure your onboarding looks like it was built by a senior designer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a global style config for the onboarding flow focusing on consistent font-weights, border-radius, and shadow depths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Update global CSS variables to match the Antigravity style config'.

steps.title: Final QA and Edge-Case Handling
steps.description: Use AI to simulate user navigation failures and ensure the onboarding flow is resilient.
steps.antigravity_prompt: List 5 common UI edge cases in onboarding flows and provide defensive code snippets for each.
steps.claude_code_command: claude review 'Check the onboarding flow for accessibility compliance and responsiveness on mobile viewports'.

pro_tips: Always use a 'Skeleton Loader' state during onboarding to hide layout shifts and improve perceived performance.
Prioritize 'Action-Based' onboarding: force the user to do one small task per screen rather than reading long text.
Use Claude Code to create an automated test suite that validates the onboarding path after every UI change.
Implement a 'Skip' button on every step; forcing users through onboarding increases churn rates significantly.
Inject your brand colors into the Antigravity prompt to ensure the generated code inherits your client's visual identity automatically.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, implement a tracking event on each step to identify where users drop off, then use Claude Code to iterate on those specific friction points.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design limitations dictate your freelance revenue. By mastering these tools, you can deliver high-end UI/UX that sets you apart in a crowded market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
